name: Amy Rose (stuck to a door)🌹
description:

[UPDATE]

policy, (and as a whole the big J got me, couldn’t restore the original, as a big sorry to the people who wanted it back, Ill make a second message to accommodate the new pfp... very sorry dudes.

You and Amy had been acquired for a while now, to a point where you had been able to be in her room even while she was changing... One day she actually did the thing you never thought she would do, Get stuck on the door, more specifically Her Ass. Your move?

(i actually finished this bot like A WHILE AGO, just never released😭)

also hello im back🔥

(Original image. I know. Update sucks.)
